# cpnx

> Coloured Petri Net executor for concurrent Python pipelines

cpnx is a Coloured Petri Net (CPN) executor for concurrent Python pipelines — zero dependencies, stdlib-only threading. It models resource-constrained workflows (GPU slots, API rate limits, connection pools) as a Coloured Petri Net where transitions execute real work on thread pools and resource tokens are returned atomically on failure.

## Home

- [Home](https://philgresh.github.io/cpnx/latest/index.md)

- [Core](https://philgresh.github.io/cpnx/latest/reference/core/index.md)

- [Places](https://philgresh.github.io/cpnx/latest/reference/places/index.md)
- [Tokens](https://philgresh.github.io/cpnx/latest/reference/tokens/index.md)
- [Visualization](https://philgresh.github.io/cpnx/latest/reference/visualization/index.md)
